heading: United States Postal Service energy management report
label: 8262i United States Postal Service energy management report
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Energy Policy Act of 1992, and not as part of the National Energy Conservation Policy Act which comprises this chapter.

children.text: a description of actions taken to reduce energy consumption;
future plans to reduce energy consumption;
an assessment of the success of the energy conservation program;
a statement of energy costs incurred in operating and maintaining all United States Postal Service facilities; and
the status of the energy efficient procurement program established under .section 8262h of this title
